title: Little John's: Galvanized Square Steel
description: Little John's: Galvanized Square Steel is a cosmetic and QoL mod that adds a varity of different building blocks inspired by the meme room redesigning videos found on Tiktok or Youtube Shorts.
body:
# Little John's: Galvanized Square Steel 

**Little John's is a cosmetic and QoL mod that adds a varity of different building blocks that are inspired by the meme room redesigning videos found on Tiktok, Instagram Reels or Youtube Shorts.**

![Cherry plank, wood and leaf covers as well as Cherry Wood Fences, a Cherry Plank Wall and a Cherry Table Saw](https://i.ibb.co/jbfWJH5/Cherry-Showcase.png)
_Cherry plank, wood and leaf covers as well as Cherry Wood Fences, a Cherry Plank Wall and a Cherry Table Saw_


## Features:

### Eco Friendly Veneers:
- Leaf Veneers (incl. Bamboo, Crimson and Warped; Cherry generates leaf particles)
- Plank Veneers
- Log Veneers
- Moss and Grass Veneers
- -> Waterloggable


### Galvanized Square Steel:
- Galvanized Square Steel and Galvanited Square Steel Grates
- Screws Borrowed From Aunt
- Galvanized Square Steel Beams
- -> Waterloggable


### Table Saws:
- New Table Saw Block for all vanilla wood types
- Alternative to the Stonecutter, supports all stonecutting recipes, even other modded recipes
- New woodcutting recipes (also work on stonecutter)
- -> Waterloggable


### Chains:
- Grand Chains
- Colossal Chains
- Golden Chains (incl. Golden Grand and Golden Colossal Chains)
- -> Waterloggable


### Frameworks:
- New Wood Frameworks for all Vanilla Log Types
- -> Waterloggable


### Chandeliers:
- New Chandelier Block for all Candle Types
- Can be placed like a lantern; hanging or standing (Will break without supporting block)
- When lit will emit light level 15, regardless of hanging or standing
- -> Waterloggable


### Fences:
- New Fences and Fence Gates made from Log Blocks
- Functioning exactly like vanilla fences


### Walls:
- New Walls made from both Plank and Log Blocks
- Functioning like wooden walls would (who couldve guessed)
- -> Plank variant probably not craftable without a mod like [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph), since the recipe is the same as the Trapdoor recipe, however the walls can still be crafted using either a stonecutter or a table saw


### Hedges:
- Basically Walls, but as leaves


### Stairs:
- Log Stairs 
- Function like... stairs


### Slabs:
- Log Slabs
- Functioning like... well yes, slabs
- If placed as a double slab, they take the look of the log standing vertical


### Music Disc:
- A music disc covering [Crazy Donkey - Morsmordre](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yavTMAPeqOw), also known as the Galvanized Square Steel Theme
- -> Craftable, not receivable through loot
- -> Discontinued starting 1.21.5 release (may return)


-> All Covers as well as galvanized steel blocks and wood frameworks are placeable, similar to glow lichen; all Covers are also waterloggable and dont require any support blocks



## Work in progress (NOT YET ADDED!):

### Candle Holders:
- Functioning very much like Torches, however can be lit with flint and steel and waterlogged
- Supporting all vanilla Candle types

---

-> There will be more blocks added in the future, I'd love to hear your ideas though, maybe they could be added next.
